MCT-174.title: NAS bucket replication — cross-NAS target (mcnas02) + DeleteMarker OFF + async replication (MCT-161 D2=D deferred backlog)
MCT-174.rationale: MCT-161 D2=D (replication deferred, single NAS box mcnas02 물리 부재). INV-5 의무 = 후속 별 Story 예약. D4=B DeleteMarker replication OFF (향후 replication 도입 시 적용 의무). 진입 gate: mcnas02 NAS box 도입 후.

MCT-175.title: compose base + dev/prod profile + env 분리 + cross-repo lock gate + ADR-030 publish
MCT-175.rationale: Epic entry — infrastructure 기반. WAL host disk bind mount (D1=C) + L1 named volume + dev/prod profile (D3=A, .env.dev/.env.prod) + NAS DNS preflight (D7=A) + cross-repo lock CI gate (D13=D). ADR-030 docker-stack-governance publish.

MCT-176.title: collector container + NAS credential rotation + effective config dump
MCT-176.rationale: compose 진입 후 첫 어플리케이션 service. mctrader-data collector container 추가 + NAS endpoint preflight (D7=A) + rotate-nas-credentials.sh 90d (D9=D) + effective config stdout dump (D14=D, env↔YAML 우선순위 표기). ADR-027 §D2 HTTP gate amendment 결정 의무 (R1 HIGH).

MCT-177.title: paper-engine daemon + SIGTERM graceful + universe override + Redis key prefix
MCT-177.rationale: daemon mode 첫 service. paper-engine restart unless-stopped (D2=A) + SIGTERM handler + 60s grace (D4=C) + universe env↔command override (D10=D) + redis key prefix signal:/market:/engine: (D15=C). NAS endpoint 정합 의존 → MCT-176 LAND 후.

MCT-178.title: backtest-runner profile + oneshot + compose config CI lint + signal-collector Redis prefix code migration
MCT-178.rationale: paper-engine 와 동일 image, command override 로 backtest 분기 (D2=A). compose profile=oneshot + restart=no oneshot. docker compose config + up --wait healthcheck gate (D16=B). signal-collector 5종 Redis prefix code migration (D15 carry from MCT-177). paper-engine image 재사용 → MCT-177 LAND 후.

MCT-179.title: observability + WAL 30G production measurement + DR mode integration + alert rule
MCT-179.rationale: EPIC-tier-promotion R-CRITICAL 해소 (WAL 30G prod measurement, peak 09:00 KST 1h burst, D5=C amendment trigger). 모든 service /metrics expose + Grafana dashboard + alert rule (D8=C). 시작 시 InvariantHarness 8종 scan (D17=A, host disk loss risk 사용자 explicit accept 의무).

MCT-180.title: integration smoke + testcontainers + resource limits + capacity alert rule
MCT-180.rationale: stack-level (compose up --wait + smoke) + repo-level (testcontainers) 2 layer gate (D11=C). compose deploy.resources.limits 명시 + container_memory_usage_bytes >80% warn alert (D18=D). SIGTERM graceful 회귀 검증 (D4=C).

MCT-181.title: image registry pin + backtest artifact NAS sync + Epic POLICY_FINALIZED 박제
MCT-181.rationale: Epic 박제 — image registry semver+sha+latest (D12=B, prod=sha-* pin, dev=latest, ghcr.io/mclayer/*) + mctrader_runs named volume + NAS sync on completion (D19=C, completion marker + 3회 retry). EPIC-RESULTS-EPIC-mctrader-docker-stack.md + CLAUDE.md POLICY_FINALIZED.

ADR-030.title: Docker stack governance — single-host compose + dev/prod profile + image registry + observability
ADR-030.expected_sections: D1 (WAL host mount + L1 volume) / D2 (paper daemon + backtest profile) / D3 (dev/prod profile) / D7 (NAS DNS preflight) / D12 (image registry pin) / D13 (cross-repo lock gate) / D17 (host disk loss risk acceptance) / D18 (resource limits) — 8 D 박제 대상
ADR-030.rationale: 본 Epic 의 governance singleton. D4/D5/D8/D9/D10/D11/D14/D15/D16/D19 = Story 구현 detail (ADR 본문 박제 제외, manifest 박제로 충분). MCT-175 Phase 1 PR 박제 (Status: Proposed). MCT-175 LAND 시 Accepted 전환.
